title: geranium corsicum
intro: Geranium corsicum, also known as the Alpine Geranium, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Geranium corsicum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Geranium corsicum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to respiratory problems.
